category_sources: source_facts.description describes Ladder as self-hosted HTTP web proxies.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ladder and source_facts.homepage points to the official everywall/ladder repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both point to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/everywall/ladder, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies self-hosted HTTP web proxy functionality.
source_facts.executables lists a ladder command-line executable.
